calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-24-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Dec-06-2024 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2024 Continued To Jan-14-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Oct-02-2024 Continued To Dec-06-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:32 am and concluding at 9:50 am.

Plaintiff State Farm General Insurance Company is represented by Danny Agai, Esq.
Defendant Steve Cox not appearing.
OSCAR MORALES-OSUNA is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

The Court Finds that Plaintiff has not submitted a Motion for Prove-Up or a Proposed Judgment.

The Court Orders the mater continued to December 6, 2024 at 9:00 am in Dept 505, to allow Plaintiff to cure the issues. (D505)
